```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(igraph)
library(stringr)
library(ggforce)
library(data.table)
library(ggupset)
library(gggenes)
library(forcats)
library(ape)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(svglite)
library(aplot)
library(ggh4x) 
library(treeio)
library(ggtree)
library(ggtreeExtra)
library(readxl)

`%ni%` <- Negate(`%in%`)
```

```{r}

IMGG_tax <- read_excel("data/IMGG/41564_2022_1270_MOESM4_ESM.xlsx", skip = 1, sheet = 7) %>% rename(genome_id = IMGG_ID) %>% mutate(MAG_status = ifelse(HQ == "Y", "HQ", "MQ"))

IMGG_all_regions <- fread("data/IMGG/all_regions.tsv") %>%
  rename(genome_id = file) %>%
  separate_longer_delim(product, delim = " / ") %>%
  mutate(
    Category = ifelse(
      str_detect(product,
        "wzy_dependent_putative|wzy_dependent_putative_NO_OPX"
      ), "Uncharacterised", "NA"
    ),
    Category = ifelse(
      str_detect(product,
        "ABC_dependent_putative|ABC_dependent_putative_NO_OPX"
      ), "Uncharacterised", Category
    ),
    Category = ifelse(
      str_detect(product,
        "ABC_wzy_dependent_putative|ABC_wzy_dependent_putative_NO_OPX"
      ), "Uncharacterised", Category
    ),
    Category = ifelse(
      str_detect(product,
      "amylovoran_stewartan|acetan|succinoglycan|colanic|xanthan|galactoglucan|psl|PNAG_eps|lactobacillus_eps|sphingans|zooglan|emulsan|PNAG_eps"
      ), "Wzx/Wzy", Category
    ),
    Category = ifelse(
      str_detect(product, 
      "cellulose|pel-positive|pel|alginate|curdlan|PNAG-ica|PNAG-pga|HA_has"), "Synthase", Category
    ),
    Category = ifelse(
      str_detect(product, 
      "fructansucrase|alpha-glucansucrase"), "Sucrase", Category
    ),
    n_Category = case_when(
      Category == "Uncharacterised" ~ 1,
      Category == "Synthase" ~ 2,
      Category == "Wzx/Wzy" ~ 3,
      Category == "Sucrase" ~ 4
    ),
    product = case_when(
      product == "acetylated-cellulose" ~ "cellulose-acetylated",
      product == "type-1-cellulose" ~ "cellulose-type-1",
      product == "type-2-cellulose" ~ "cellulose-type-2",
      product == "type-3-cellulose" ~ "cellulose-type-3",
      product == "generic-cellulose" ~"cellulose-generic",
      .default = product
    )
    ) %>% left_join(IMGG_tax, by = c("genome_id"))  %>%
    mutate(Database = "IMGG")

IMGG_tax_derep_HQ <- IMGG_tax %>% filter(HQ == "Y") %>% distinct(Rep_MAG_ID, .keep_all = TRUE)

IMGG_all_regions_derep <- IMGG_all_regions %>% filter(genome_id %in% IMGG_tax_derep_HQ$genome_id)


```

# % of complete BGCs in the HQ species representatives and the number of BGCs/MAGs
```{r}

# Create base dataframe with common transformations
base_df <- IMGG_all_regions_derep %>%
  right_join(IMGG_tax_derep_HQ) %>%
  mutate(
    BGC_length = as.integer(end - start),
    Complete = !contig_edge,
    identifier = paste(genome_id, MAG_status)
  )

# Get distinct genomes for BGC/MAG calculations
distinct_genomes <- base_df %>% 
  distinct(identifier, .keep_all = TRUE) %>% 
  select(-identifier)

# Calculate percentage complete BGCs
percentage <- base_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(Category)) %>%
  group_by(MAG_status, Category, n_Category) %>%
  summarise(`% complete exoPS BGCs` = round(mean(Complete), 5) * 100, .groups = "drop") %>%
  bind_rows(
    base_df %>%
      filter(!is.na(Category)) %>%
      group_by(MAG_status) %>%
      summarise(`% complete exoPS BGCs` = round(mean(Complete), 5) * 100, .groups = "drop") %>%
      mutate(Category = "All", n_Category = 0)
  )

# Calculate exoPS BGCs/MAGs for all categories in one operation
categories <- c("All", "Uncharacterised", "Synthase", "Wzx/Wzy", "Sucrase")
n_categories <- c(0, 1, 2, 3, 4)

epsSMASH_IMGG <- map2_dfr(categories, n_categories, ~ {
  if (.x == "All") {
    base_df %>%
      group_by(genome_id, MAG_status) %>%
      mutate(BGCs = ifelse(is.na(Category), 0, n())) %>%
      group_by(MAG_status) %>%
      summarise(`exoPS BGCs/MAGs` = round(mean(BGCs), 5), .groups = "drop") %>%
      mutate(Category = .x, n_Category = .y)
  } else {
    base_df %>%
      filter(Category == .x) %>%
      group_by(genome_id, MAG_status) %>%
      mutate(BGCs = n()) %>%
      bind_rows(distinct_genomes %>% filter(Category != .x | is.na(Category))) %>%
      mutate(BGCs = ifelse(is.na(BGCs), 0, BGCs)) %>%
      group_by(MAG_status) %>%
      summarise(`exoPS BGCs/MAGs` = round(mean(BGCs), 5), .groups = "drop") %>%
      mutate(Category = .x, n_Category = .y)
  }
}) %>%
  left_join(percentage, by = c("MAG_status", "Category", "n_Category"))


```
# Plotting the stats for IMGG epsSMASH results
```{r}

myColors <- "#1F78B4"

names(myColors) <- c("HQ")
custom_colors <- scale_fill_manual(name = "MAG Quality", values = myColors, drop = FALSE)

# Function to create the combined plots
create_combined_plot <- function(data, title_text) {
  # Transform the data
  plot_data <- data %>% 
    mutate(MAG_status = factor(MAG_status, levels = names(myColors)))
  
  ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = Category, y = `exoPS BGCs/MAGs`, fill = MAG_status)) +
    # Main bar (full height)
    geom_col(position = position_dodge2(width = 0.9), alpha = 0.3, width = 0.8) +
    # Filled portion based on completeness percentage
    geom_rect(
      aes(xmin = as.numeric(factor(Category)) - 0.4, 
          xmax = as.numeric(factor(Category)) + 0.4,
          ymin = 0, 
          ymax = `exoPS BGCs/MAGs` * (`% complete exoPS BGCs`/100),
          group = interaction(Category, MAG_status)),
      position = position_dodge2(width = 0.9)
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(name = "Quality", values = myColors, drop = FALSE) +
    ggtitle(title_text) +
    xlab("") +
    ylab("exoPS BGCs/MAGs") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 12),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14),
      legend.position = "right",
      plot.title = element_text(size = 16, hjust = 0.5),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank()
    )
}

# Create plots for each dataset
IMGG_combined <- create_combined_plot(epsSMASH_IMGG %>% filter(!is.na(`% complete exoPS BGCs`)), "") 
IMGG_combined
```
